Who we are

About African Sports Technology Network

The ecosystem platform for sports technology in Africa - connecting international innovation with African markets, supporting African ventures, and providing the compliance and intelligence infrastructure the sector needs.

Our purpose

Building the African sports tech ecosystem

African Sports Technology Network (AfricanSTN) is the ecosystem platform for sports technology in Africa.

The platform connects international sports tech companies with African markets, supports emerging African sports tech ventures, and provides compliance, distribution, and market intelligence services.

AfricanSTN is a South African-registered entity, operating as the subsidiary of Sports Tech Africa Limited (STZA), a UK-incorporated holding company.

Get involved

Connect

Linking international sports tech companies with African market opportunities, partners, and distribution channels.

Comply

Acting as registered POPIA representative for foreign companies operating in South Africa.

Inform

Publishing market intelligence, research, and the African sports tech company directory.

How we operate

What AfricanSTN stands for

Authoritative

Content is researched, specific, and grounded in data. The African sports tech landscape is complex - and that complexity deserves accurate, substantiated coverage.

Connected

Positioned at the intersection of international sports tech and African markets. The value is in introductions, facilitation, and bridging - not gatekeeping.

Professional

Operating to international standards across compliance, documentation, and communications - reflecting the quality of work expected by international partners.

Accessible

Complex topics - POPIA, cross-border data, market entry - are explained plainly. Expertise should open doors, not create barriers.

Pan-African

South Africa is the operational base, but the lens is continental. AfricanSTN represents the breadth of African sports technology, not a single market.

Measured

Ambitious about what the African sports tech ecosystem can become - and honest about where things stand today. Substance over hype, always.

Get involved

Be part of the African sports technology ecosystem

For compliance support, market intelligence, or a partner to help navigate Africa - AfricanSTN is a good starting point.

Register interest Contact us

We use cookies and local storage to improve your experience. Essential cookies are required for the site to function. Optional cookies help with analytics and remembering your preferences. Learn more
